consistency.spell_level_and_scaling: Consistent. Level 6 spell that scales linearly by +10 HP per slot level above 6th.
consistency.data_fields: All required fields (slug, name, level, school, ritual, casting_time, range, components, duration, description, classes) are present and correctly formatted.

quality.clarity: The description is clear regarding the healing amount, secondary effects (curing blindness, deafness, disease), and restrictions (no effect on constructs or undead).
quality.completeness: The 'At Higher Levels' section provides precise scaling instructions.
quality.format_quality: The formatting within the description section (using bolding/italics via markdown conventions, though this is stored as plain text here) seems standard for spell descriptions.

mechanics.limitations: Does not affect constructs or undead.
mechanics.casting_requirements: Requires 1 action, V (Verbal) and S (Somatic) components.
mechanics.scaling_effectiveness: The scaling (+10 HP per level above 6) is standard for potent healing spells at higher tiers of play, ensuring it remains relevant.
